keyPoints: A servlet is a Java class that extends the HttpServlet class and can handle HTTP requests and responses.
The life cycle of a servlet includes the initialization, service, and destruction phases.
Tomcat is a popular servlet container that allows developers to deploy and run servlets.
Servlets are used to create dynamic web pages and handle requests from clients.
Servlets can be used to perform various tasks such as authentication, authorization, and data processing.
JSP (JavaServer Pages) is a technology that allows developers to create dynamic web pages using Java code.
